title: Spaghetti alla carbonara
grammar_features_introduced: Italian recipe-register infinitives (mettere, tagliare, versare, saltare)
gerund and participial phrases (aggiungendo, eliminando, lasciando)
impersonal si (si prepara, si emulsiona, si cuoce)
quantifier precision typical of recipes (un cucchiaio di, mezzo centimetro, due minuti)
cognate_patterns_showcased: recipe-vocabulary pairs between French and Italian cooking traditions
notes: Italian-only recipe page. No drill audio. Companion English page at 001-carbonara-en.html. Includes a link to the English translation at the top. The content is an authentic Roman carbonara — guanciale, pecorino romano, uova, pepe — with explicit notes against cream, bacon, onion, and garlic.
